analysis_description: See parent branch manual_traders/R3_VEV/.../analysis.json entry round4_phase1 OR r4_phase1_gate.json in this folder.
used_to_decide: Phase 1 completed in prior commit; gate duplicated in r4_phase1_gate.json.

analysis_description: Phase 2: named-bot burst echo (Mark01→Mark22, ≥3 VEV legs) vs VEV_5300 fwd5; joint Sonic gate on R4 extract fwd20; signed-flow lead-lag extract vs VEV_5300; extract microprice tilt vs vol; BS IV residual VEV_5300; Mark22 seller_agg passive markout proxy.
used_to_decide: Joint gate shows higher extract fwd20 (Welch t≈7.9); burst-conditioned VEV_5300 fwd5 beats control (t≈3.15). Microprice tilt→vol nearly flat (corr≈0.01). trader_v1 tests joint-gate MM on extract+5200+5300 only (sim); worse total 3634 over d1–3.

round4_phase2_complete.interaction_with_phase1: Phase1 Mark01→Mark22 pair dominance is REFINED by 3+VEV burst filter and VEV_5300 echo table. Phase1 burst→extract mean is consistent with Phase2 joint-gate extract shift (different conditioning). Mark67 tape signal remains orthogonal (not simulated in trader_v1).

top_5_tradeable_edges.edge: Multi-VEV Mark01→Mark22 burst → higher VEV_5300 fwd5 vs control
top_5_tradeable_edges.phase1_link: Refines pair count story with burst structure

top_5_tradeable_edges.edge: Sonic joint gate (5200&5300≤2) → higher extract fwd20 vs wide
top_5_tradeable_edges.phase1_link: Operationalizes R3 STRATEGY on R4 mids

top_5_tradeable_edges.edge: Signed-flow contemporaneous negative corr extract vs VEV_5300
top_5_tradeable_edges.phase1_link: Orthogonal time-series structure vs pair tables

top_5_tradeable_edges.edge: Mark22 seller_agg at bid on VEV_5300 → negative fwd20 (adverse passive proxy)

top_5_tradeable_edges.edge: IV residual file for Phase3 × gate × Mark overlays
top_5_tradeable_edges.phase1_link: Adds vol dimension to counterparty-conditioned work

negative_results: Microprice tilt vs extract short-horizon vol: corr ~0.009 (no strong microstructure edge in this slice).
trader_v1 joint-gate MM sim: total PnL 3634 worse over d1–3 — gate alone insufficient for 200k/day; needs counterparty-conditioned logic once API exposes tape trades in-state or offline policy table.

analysis_description: Phase 3: Sonic joint gate on R4 inner-join panel (5200+5300+extract timestamps per R3 script); inclineGod spread–spread correlations on that grid; Phase1/2 counterparty and burst tests re-run with backward merge_asof gate on trade/burst times; signed-flow corr split tight vs wide timestamps on asof gate.
used_to_decide: Inner-join extract fwd20 tight vs wide Welch t≈7.94 (matches Phase2 strength). Signed-flow extract vs VEV_5300 lag-0 corr is much more negative on tight timestamps (-0.23) than wide (+0.013) — gate concentrates a cross-asset flow structure. Mark01→Mark22 burst fwd5 vs wide-book VEV_5300 fwd5 pool remains significant (t≈3.23) but almost all bursts are asof-tight (no clean Mark×tight×wide three-way split on tape). Per-day tables: r4_p3_day_stability.csv, r4_p3_mark_fwd_by_day.csv, r4_p3_m0122_fwd20_by_day.csv, r4_p3_burst_echo_by_day.csv. Sim: v2 full-surface gate MM 6088; v3 wing spread<=4 cap 3905 (wing cap hurt vs v2 on this tape).

round4_phase3_complete.gate_convention: Inner join (day,timestamp) VEV_5200 + VEV_5300 + VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT; same spirit as round3work/vouchers_final_strategy/analyze_vev_5200_5300_tight_gate_r3.py aligned_panel.
round4_phase3_complete.trade_gate_attachment: merge_asof backward per day for counterparty-conditioned rows

top_5_tradeable_edges.edge: Extract 20-tick forward on inner-join panel: joint tight vs not
top_5_tradeable_edges.phase2_link: Confirms Phase2 joint-gate extract shift with R3-style timestamp grid

top_5_tradeable_edges.edge: Signed Mark flow: extract vs VEV_5300 contemporaneous corr much stronger (negative) when gate tight on asof-aligned timestamps
top_5_tradeable_edges.phase2_link: Phase2 lag-0 ≈ -0.15 pooled; gate sharpens the conditioning

top_5_tradeable_edges.edge: Spread–spread comovement across VEV strikes on inner-join timestamps (inclineGod)
top_5_tradeable_edges.evidence: r4_p3_spread_correlations.csv; top pairs r>0.32 for adjacent strikes up the wing
top_5_tradeable_edges.phase2_link: Adds spread object layer missing from mid-centric Phase2 tables

top_5_tradeable_edges.edge: Mark01→Mark22 ≥3-VEV burst: VEV_5300 fwd5 vs wide-book fwd5 pool still elevated (t≈3.23) under asof-tight predominance
top_5_tradeable_edges.phase1_link: Same structural pair as Phase1; Phase3 stresses overlap with tight-book regime

top_5_tradeable_edges.edge: Participant forward table split tight vs wide-on-panel (merge_asof) for horizon scan
top_5_tradeable_edges.phase1_link: Phase1 table regen with gate columns

negative_results: Counterparty-heavy events (big bursts, M01→M22 bursts, Mark22 passive prints) are almost always under asof-tight gate on this tape — weak three-way (Mark pattern × tight × wide) separation.
Tight big-bursts vs wide-book extract_fwd20 pool: t≈0.88, p≈0.38 — no burst-specific extract alpha vs wide baseline.
Mark22 seller_agg vs wide-book fwd20 pool: t≈-1.24, p≈0.22 — not significant; all 160 prints asof-tight.
round4_phase3_complete.sonic_gate_cleans_signal: Partially for cross-asset signed-flow structure (tight vs wide timestamp corr). Not as a separator for Mark01→Mark22 burst echo or Mark22 passive markout on this sample — those live almost entirely in the tight regime, so the gate does not carve independent wide-bucket controls.

analysis_description: Per-day counterparty evidence under merge_asof joint gate: Mark×role×tight×horizon (r4_p3_mark_fwd_by_day.csv); Mark01→Mark22 all-symbol fwd20 mean by day when asof-tight (r4_p3_m0122_fwd20_by_day.csv); M01→M22 ≥3VEV burst VEV_5300 fwd5 stats by day (r4_p3_burst_echo_by_day.csv). Produced by r4_phase3_analysis.py.
used_to_decide: M01→M22 fwd20 under asof-tight: day1 mean -0.048 (t≈-1.42), day2 +0.023 (t≈0.75), day3 +0.039 (t≈1.12) — sign not stable across days at K=20. Burst echo fwd5: positive mean all three days (~0.23–0.31) with ~0.50 frac positive. Sim: trader_v3 wing spread cap lowers total vs v2 (3905 vs 6088), so v2 wing PnL was net additive on this tape.

analysis_description: Mark01→Mark22 basket prints decomposed by traded symbol, day, and K∈{5,20,100} on asof-tight trades (r4_p3_m0122_fwd_by_symbol_day.csv). Identifies which legs contribute to pooled mean (e.g. VEV_5300 short-K negative on day1; VEV_6500 flat zero fwd from one-tick books).
used_to_decide: Pooled M01→M22 masks offsetting wing vs core dynamics; K=100 on VEV_5300 day3 t≈1.07 (n=69). Sim: trader_v5 (v2 + hydro MM clip 8 at joint gate) total 11526 worse/all vs v2 6088 — hydro MM is strongly additive on this tape under the same voucher gate.

analysis_description: Directed buyer→seller pairs from Phase 1 graph (top 8 by count): per-day, per-horizon K∈{5,20,100}, same-symbol forward mid move on asof-tight trades only (r4_p3_top_pair_fwd_by_day.csv). Hydro-heavy pairs (14↔38) have tiny n per day (36–116); M01→M22 has hundreds of prints per day.
used_to_decide: M01→M22: K=100 on day 3 shows mean_fwd≈0.14 and t≈2.24 (n=549) while K=5 stays negative — horizon matters; day-stability for short K still mixed. Mark14→Mark38 / Mark38→Mark14 cells flip sign by day at K=20 with low n. Sim ablation: trader_v4 (MM 28 vs v1 18) identical PnL 3634 — clip not binding vs v1 on R4 joint-gate MM.

analysis_description: Phase 1 hydro duopoly legs Mark14→Mark38 and Mark38→Mark14 decomposed by symbol × day × K on asof-tight trades (same convention as r4_p3_m0122_fwd_by_symbol_day.csv). Primary mass is HYDROGEL_PACK rows; voucher legs are low-n.
used_to_decide: M14→M38 on HYDROGEL under tight: day1 K20 mean≈+2.08 t≈1.34 (n=25); day3 K5/K20 negative means with n=68. Return leg M38→M14 in second CSV for asymmetry. Sim: trader_v6 hydro clip 14 vs v5 clip 8 — identical 11526 and same hydro day PnL (clip not binding vs v5).

analysis_description: Mark01→Mark22 asof-tight trades pooled across days 1–3 by symbol and K (r4_p3_m0122_symbol_k_overall.csv): n, mean_fwd, std, t_vs_zero, frac_pos, and frac_days_mean_pos among days with n≥5 for that cell.
used_to_decide: VEV_5300 K5 pooled mean negative (t≈-2.29, n=132) but frac_days_mean_pos 0/3 — all daily means negative at K5; K100 pooled mean small positive (t≈0.27). VEV_6000/6500 zero fwd under convention. Sim: trader_v7 (core+extract+hydro only) 9069 vs v5 11526 — ~2457 from wing VEV MM while hydro unchanged.

analysis_description: Mark14→Mark38 and Mark38→Mark14 asof-tight trades pooled across days by symbol×K (same columns as r4_p3_m0122_symbol_k_overall.csv plus buyer/seller): r4_p3_m1438_symbol_k_overall.csv and r4_p3_m3814_symbol_k_overall.csv.
used_to_decide: M14→M38 on VEV_4000: pooled K20 mean≈+1.1 t≈2.10 n=55 frac_days_mean_pos=1.0 — wing voucher prints under this pair are consistently positive at medium horizon; hydro same leg has noisy high-variance pooled means (large std). Sim: trader_v8 wing clip 20 vs v5 clip 10 — identical 11526 (wing clip not binding between 10 and 20).
